title: Software Update - DFU -  Going to sleep mode during update
scenario: DFU does not resume or complete successfully after phone wakes from sleep mode during firmware update
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) on the connected device.
5. During the DFU process, allow the mobile phone to enter sleep mode (e.g., press the Power button or let the screen time out).
6. Wait for a few seconds, then wake the phone (e.g., press the Power button again).
7. Unlock the phone and return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: The DFU process should continue running or complete successfully after waking the phone and returning to the app. The app should show the update progress or a completion status.
